endpoints.name: GET /{resourceId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/deviceSecurityGroups
endpoints.description: Gets the list of device security groups for the specified IoT hub resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEID}} with a real resourceid.

endpoints.name: GET /{resourceId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/deviceSecurityGroups/{deviceSecurityGroupName}
endpoints.description: Gets the device security group for the specified IoT hub resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEVICESECURITYGROUPNAME}} with a real devicesecuritygroupname. Replace {{RESOURCEID}} with a real resourceid.

endpoints.name: PUT /{resourceId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/deviceSecurityGroups/{deviceSecurityGroupName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates the device security group on a specified IoT hub resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEVICESECURITYGROUPNAME}} with a real devicesecuritygroupname. Replace {{RESOURCEID}} with a real resourceid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{resourceId}/providers/Microsoft.Security/deviceSecurityGroups/{deviceSecurityGroupName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEVICESECURITYGROUPNAME}} with a real devicesecuritygroupname. Replace {{RESOURCEID}} with a real resourceid.
